Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection until SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Unavailable
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average waiting time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the first Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to lead to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, conditional on at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed occurring
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, or SW-EIC Minor Revision) in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Recommendation overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection when followed by multiple SW-AE Assign Reviewers before any SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'
